address: 25 Lisa Drive, Dix Hills, New York, 11746
description: 5-bedroom, 4.5-bath expanded colonial on a private 1-acre lot in Dix Hills, Half Hollow Hills schools. In-ground pool, hot tub, multi-level cedar deck, finished walk-out basement, owned roof-mounted solar, attached carport, central air, and a professionally landscaped yard that backs to mature woods.A marble checkerboard foyer with sweeping curved staircase makes the first impression. The formal dining room, sun-drenched living room with custom built-ins, and hardwood floors flow across the main level. The primary suite is a true retreat — vaulted cathedral ceiling, full brick fireplace wall, walk-in closet, and spa en-suite with jetted tub, skylights, dual vanity, and separate shower. A second oversized en-suite with cherry hardwoods, vaulted ceiling, and private sitting area adds flexibility for guests or extended family.The finished walk-out basement lives like its own resort: granite wet bar seating six, sprawling lounge, marble-floor gym, cedar sauna, hot-tub room, and renovated full bath with frameless glass shower.Outside, a multi-thousand-square-foot stamped-paver patio with stone balustrades wraps the rear and steps down to the in-ground pool, cedar deck, and hot tub. Minutes to the LIE, Northern State, Dix Hills Park, golf, shopping, and dining.Built 1967.
